reasoning: According to multiple sources, including oddsmakers and expert predictions from right before the 2025-26 season begins (knowledge cutoff October 2025), the Brooklyn Nets are heavily projected to be one of the worst teams in the NBA. Their odds to win the Eastern Conference are +50,000 (0.2% implied probability without vig), the longest odds in the league. They have a projected win total under 20 games and are openly rebuilding with a roster focused on development and securing a top pick in the 2026 NBA draft. A probability of 0.02 (the minimum allowed by guidelines) correctly reflects this near impossibility while acknowledging they are structurally an NBA team.
